column1: Betty said to Lucy, "I'm sorry to disturb you."

column2: Betty told Lucy she was sorry to disturb her.

column1: Dan said, "I've missed my bus, I'll be late and my boss will be furious."

column2: Dan said he had missed his bus, he would be late and his boss would be furious.

column1: The girl said to her friends, "I didn't go to the stadium yesterday."

column2: The girl told her friends she hadn't gone to the stadium the previous day.

column1: My brother said, "I'm talking on the phone."

column1: Nora says to Jack, "I'll tell you what to do."

column1: Lora said, "I wish I had something to eat."

column2: Lora said she wished she had something to eat.

column1: Bill said, "I've been ill for a fortnight."

column2: Bill said he had been ill for a fortnight.

column1: She said, "I've never set eyes on him in my life."

column2: She said she had never set eyes on him in her life.

column1: He said, "Bill wants to know if you are free tomorrow."

column1: Jane says, "When the doorbell rang I was playing the violin."

column2: Jane says when the doorbell rang she was playing a violin.
